planned_actions: Add extractHints() function to output.ts that inspects Ajv errors and the source schema to produce contextual hints
Modify validationError() to accept optional schema object parameter and include hints field in output
Handle 4 Ajv error keywords: required (show field type+description), enum (show allowed values), additionalProperties (show allowed property names), and include top-level required fields list
Export getSchemaObject() from schema.ts so output.ts can access raw schema for hint extraction
Keep hints as an additive field - existing error structure unchanged
edge_cases: Schema has $ref references to _defs - must resolve or note limitation
Nested object schemas with their own required/enum fields
Empty or missing properties in schema definition
Ajv error with no matching schema context
non_goals: Changing Ajv configuration or error format
Supporting deeply nested $ref resolution across files
demo_steps: AC1: Submit data missing required fields to a schema - verify hints.required_fields lists all required fields
AC2: Submit data with invalid enum value - verify hints shows allowed_values for that field
AC3: Submit data with extra properties to additionalProperties:false schema - verify hints shows allowed_properties
AC4: Submit data missing a required field - verify hints shows that field type and description
AC5: Verify output still contains error, code, schema, details fields plus new hints field

known_risks: $ref properties (e.g. producer_type -> agentType) have no field_type in hints because raw schema contains $ref not resolved type - Ajv still provides allowedValues for enum cases
navigateSchema only handles direct properties and array items, not deeply nested $ref chains
untested_paths: Validation error on deeply nested objects (3+ levels deep)
Schema with allOf containing required fields
self_check.summary: All 5 ACs verified manually. Backward-compatible change - existing error structure preserved, hints added as new field. No caller changes needed.

tier_1.details: All 5 ACs verified: required fields, enum hints, additionalProperties, field type, backward compat

tier_2.details: Design authority and QA both approved

closure.change_summary: Enhanced validationError() in output.ts to include schema-derived hints: required_fields list, enum allowed_values, additionalProperties allowed_properties, and missing field type/description. Added getSchemaObject() to schema.ts. Purely additive change - no caller modifications needed.

reviews.summary: Clean backward-compatible change, proper edge case handling
All 5 ACs pass. $ref limitation documented as non-goal.

open_risks: $ref properties lack field_type in hints - acknowledged limitation

verdict.rationale: All 5 ACs verified by QA. Design authority approved structural quality. Purely additive change with zero caller impact. The $ref limitation is documented, scoped as non-goal, and degrades gracefully. Solves the real user problem: validation errors now include actionable hints for required fields, enum values, allowed properties, and field types.

what_went_well: extractHints is a pure function with defensive handling
No caller changes needed - purely additive
what_broke: Worker agent implemented code during contract drafting step - should only have written the contract
what_was_surprising: Ajv params.allowedValues already provides enum values for $ref-resolved fields, so the $ref limitation is less impactful than expected
memory_candidates: getSchemaObject() in schema.ts provides raw schema access without Ajv coupling
next_time_guidance: When spawning worker for implementation contract, explicitly state DO NOT implement code, only write the contract
